purpose: Bridal beauty collection flat lay with premium presentation. Wedding-occasion targeted.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium bridal beauty package flat lay showing {product_collection} arranged elegantly on cream silk fabric, white roses and small white pearl details, soft golden directional natural light, hyper-realistic luxury detail, shot from directly overhead, romantic premium aesthetic, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: B05. Saudi adaptation guidance: Saudi wedding beauty market significant. Cream and white palette appropriate (avoid pure white which reads Western bridal). Include subtle traditional elements. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per week wedding season.
